acceptance_criteria.text: A pyproject.toml exposes a `repopact` console script dispatching init/validate/new/dashboard/spec/check-frozen
pip/pipx install . then `repopact init --target X` produces a repository that passes validation (issue #2)
Installed subcommands operate on the target repository (cwd/--root), not the install location; seed schemas/templates ship in the wheel with no source duplication
Validation and tests pass; loose-script usage (python scripts/*.py) is unchanged
